title: 触らぬ者にたたりなしですわ！！

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Shhh... Don't say a word.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I just came to a realization. Gold Ship only acts
out the more you react to her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Which means, I must simply ignore her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But, whether you react or not, there's no telling
what Gold Ship has up her sleeve... And I think I
need to tell this to Mejiro McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...No, you needn't worry. This is a match between me and her.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: So, if you'll excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: ...Hmmm?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Bzz, bzzt, bzzzt!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Look, I found a Golshi cicada!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What the—I've just received a suspicious
transmission! It's an urgent message from Planet
Golshi!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
No way... there's an all-you-can-eat melon parfait
event?! And it comes with a rare photo of Mac
munching on a mont blanc?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: ...McQueen, you can't be serious.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen plans to stick by her words.
She's silent in the face of Gold Ship's antics.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I w-won't be deceived by your crocodile tears!
Certainly, this is just a trap.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Waaaah...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Hold on a minute! What happened to that
obnoxiously cheery demeanor of yours?!
choice_data_list: Don't be fooled! It's a trap!
Don't be fooled! It's a trap!
...Maybe it's best to just play along?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! I can't believe this! What happened to that
obnoxiously cheery demeanor of yours?!
choice_data_list: Don't be fooled! It's a trap!
Don't be fooled! It's a trap!
...Maybe it's best to just play along?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Nahahaha! Why yes, this was a trap, McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You reacted, so you lose! Now you have to play
nice with me for the rest of the day!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Aaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Come now. You two are the only ones that come
when I cry wolf y'know? All right, then, the plan
for today is...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hm? Gold Ship?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Of course not! It takes passion to come up
with these things! True heart and passion!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...Still, could you hurry it up? The two of us have
a training schedule to attend to.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I said shush! At least give me time to summon
down a UFO!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huh, a UFO?! With what tools?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...What a liar, that Gold Ship. Why do I allow her
to waste my time?
choice_data_list:
I guess nothing good ever comes from indulging
her.

I guess nothing good ever comes from indulging
her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. I won't be fooled again. I must steel
myself in the face of her trickery.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...Goodness, I never should have worried for her
in the first place.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen sighs heavily and resolves to
stay unfazed next time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But only three days later, she once again falls
victim to Gold Ship's antics.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Urk! Well, I suppose it's not right of me to treat you too coldly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I apologize, Gold Ship. I didn't intend to hurt
your feelings. Would you like a pat on the back?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hm? Should I take that nod to mean yes?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: ...Pet me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh! Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
At times, you behave most like a child, contrary
to your stature. And your hair is silky soft.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: How was that? Has your mood improved now?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: ...More.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...All right then.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Right on, McQueen! Now let's go pet a hundred
rhinoceros beetles!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Rhinoce—what?! I refuse! The moment your spirits
lift, it's more nonsense from you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen is once again at the whims of
Gold Ship, who is back to her cheery self.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But on a closer look, the relaxed expression on
Mejiro McQueen's face suggests that she feels
relieved.
